get.summary: Get amount out for selling a ERC20 / native token.

parameters.name: from_address
parameters.description: Effectively `recipient`. This is the **pay out** address of the final swapped tokens. Funding address will always be the address calls Native Router.

parameters.name: src_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, arbitrum, ...

parameters.name: dst_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, arbitrum, ...

parameters.name: token_in
parameters.description: Token address for the token to be sold.

parameters.name: token_out
parameters.description: Token address for the token to be bought.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in ether unit.

parameters.name: amount_wei
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in wei unit.

parameters.name: expiry_time
parameters.description: The expiry time of the quote, in seconds.

parameters.name: timeout_millis
parameters.description: Timeout in milliseconds

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

get.summary: Get signed order data for selling a ERC20 / native token. Submit the return data to Native router to execute swap.

parameters.name: from_address
parameters.description: Effectively `recipient`. This is the **pay out** address of the final swapped tokens. Funding address will always be the address calls Native Router.

parameters.name: beneficiary_address
parameters.description: Address of the end user that initiated the swap request. This is REQUIRED if you are an aggregator/widget/wallet. Optional for solvers.

parameters.name: src_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, arbitrum, ... (refer to network name reference)

parameters.name: dst_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, arbitrum, ... (refer to network name reference)

parameters.name: token_in
parameters.description: Address of the token to be sold

parameters.name: token_out
parameters.description: Address of the token to be bought

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in ether unit. (Skip if already passing `amount_wei`)

parameters.name: amount_wei
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in wei unit. (Skip if already passing `amount`)

parameters.name: expiry_time
parameters.description: The expiry time of the quote, in seconds. Recommand 60 for all networks to avoid quoting errors.

parameters.name: slippage
parameters.description: Number in percent. For example, passing the value 5 means 5%, 0.1 means 0.1% slippage tolerance. Recommend keeping default 0.5

parameters.name: timeout_millis
parameters.description: Timeout in milliseconds for the API request, useful in latency-sensitive applications.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The swap router version. Suggest using the latest 4

parameters.name: allow_multihop
parameters.description: Whether to use multihop within all Native supported pairs for quoting. Recommanded true for wallets/widgets.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

get.summary: Similar to `/firm-quote`. Just that response is raw calldata that can be submitted on-chain directly.

parameters.name: from_address
parameters.description: Effectively `recipient`. This is the **pay out** address of the final swapped tokens. Funding address will always be the address calls Native Router.

parameters.name: beneficiary_address
parameters.description: Address of the end user that initiated the swap request.

parameters.name: src_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, bsc, ...

parameters.name: dst_chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, bsc, ...

parameters.name: token_in
parameters.description: Address of the token to be sold

parameters.name: token_out
parameters.description: Address of the token to be bought

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in ether unit.

parameters.name: amount_wei
parameters.description: Amount of token to be sold, in wei unit.

parameters.name: expiry_time
parameters.description: The expiry time of the quote, in seconds.

parameters.name: slippage
parameters.description: Number in percent. For example, passing the value 5 means 5%, 0.1 means 0.1% slippage tolerance. By default it's 0.

parameters.name: timeout_millis
parameters.description: Timeout in milliseconds

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

get.summary: Get all the tokens supported by Native

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, bsc, ...

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Comma-separated blockchains. Exactly one of [chain, chains] is required

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

get.summary: Get all the chains supported by Native

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

get.summary: Get price levels for all supported pair in a chain

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, arbitrum, ...

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

500.description: There was an exception with the server

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Blockchain name, eg: ethereum, bsc, ...

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Comma-separated blockchains. Exactly one of [chain, chains] is required

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key that was assigned to you by Native

chain.description: Native blockchain name, eg: ethereum, bsc, etc

token.description: Symbol of the native token for the chain

isMainnet.description: Specify if token is on mainnet
